channel.title: Claude Usage Widget — macOS
channel.description: Auto-update feed for the macOS native build.

item.title: Version 1.5.4
item.description:
Sleeping face + 3-tier Claude activity detection

  • New .sleeping face: closed eyes + tiny z mark, shown when Claude is running but no session file has changed in the last 60s
  • "Active" now means real work — file under ~/.claude/projects was modified within 60s (not just process exists)
  • Fixes v1.5.3 UX where VS Code Claude Code extension kept the icon in ACTIVE forever

item.title: Version 1.5.3
item.description:
Wobble Shake motion + solid white eyes

  • When Claude Code is actively running, the menu-bar icon now vibrates side-to-side ±1.5 px at ~3 Hz — visibly "working hard" rather than just changing eye shape
  • Eyes switched from transparent cutouts (which revealed wallpaper) to solid white rectangles — clean high contrast on any menu bar background
  • Wobble respects Reduce Motion and the Settings → "Animated menu-bar face" toggle

item.title: Version 1.5.2
item.description:
Eyes were invisible — fixed

  • v1.5.0/.1 drew eye cutouts with NSColor.clear which paints transparent pixels on top of the body — composites to "no change". The eye notches never actually appeared.
  • Eyes are now appended as sub-paths with windingRule=.evenOdd, producing real transparent holes in the body.
  • Bumped the eye box to ~2× the original SVG size so all three expressions are visible at 18×18 px.

item.title: Version 1.5.1
item.description:
Fixes the "Claude active" face that never lit up

  • v1.5.0 checked ~/.claude-status.json mtime, but that file only exists if you've configured a status-line script — most users haven't
  • Replaced with pgrep -x claude every 10s; verified via the new "activity" log channel
  • Added Settings → "Animated menu-bar face" toggle so you can disable the syncing blink if it's distracting

item.title: Version 1.5.0
item.description:
Three-expression menu-bar face: idle, syncing, Claude-active

  • Idle dots (●●) when nothing is happening
  • Blinking slits (−−) while a sync is in flight
  • Wide alert eyes (◉◉) when Claude Code is actively running on your machine (detected via ~/.claude-status.json mtime)
  • All eye animation respects the system Reduce Motion setting

item.title: Version 1.4.3
item.description:
Cache safety: race fix, denial cooldown, NaN guard

  • Fixed a thread-race on the credential cache (URLSession bg queue ↔ main thread) that could read garbage
  • 5-minute cooldown after a Keychain denial so users who later click "Always Allow" don't have to restart
  • NaN / Infinity in expiresAt is now treated as "unknown" rather than "fresh forever"
  • Whitespace-only credentialPathOverride values are now trimmed away
  • 13 new XCTest cases (total 35) covering all of the above

item.title: Version 1.4.2
item.description:
Fixes Keychain re-prompts caused by expiresAt unit mismatch

  • Claude Code stores token expiresAt in milliseconds; older code assumed both ms and seconds incorrectly, treating every cached token as expired
  • Unit is now auto-detected (>1e11 = ms, otherwise seconds) so cache survives between syncs
  • Added unified-logging diagnostics under subsystem com.innohi.claudeusagewidget / category creds — stream live with: log stream --predicate 'subsystem == "com.innohi.claudeusagewidget"' --style compact

item.title: Version 1.4.1
item.description:
Fixes repeated macOS Keychain prompts

  • Credentials are now held in memory between syncs — no more Keychain prompt on every 5-minute tick
  • Cache invalidates automatically when the token expires or the server returns 401 / 403
  • If the Keychain prompt is denied once, the widget stops re-prompting until you explicitly retry
  • User-triggered Refresh / Retry / multi-account picker still force a fresh read

item.title: Version 1.4.0
item.description:
Data export · multi-account · rich tooltip · CI

  • CSV / JSON export of the 7-day usage history (Settings → Data)
  • Multi-account credential path — point the widget at a non-default credentials file
  • Rich menu-bar tooltip — hover the icon for current %, ETA, weekly %, last sync
  • GitHub Actions CI for tests + release automation
  • Mac App Store submission scaffolding (entitlements + dual-build guide)
  • 22-test unit suite (swift test) for ETA, sparkline, thresholds, formatting

item.title: Version 1.3.0
item.description:
Custom thresholds · friendlier errors · JA/ZH · 3-step onboarding

  • Custom alert thresholds — replace fixed 80/90% with two user-tunable sliders
  • 3-step onboarding — intro → login guidance with copy-claude-login → notifications opt-in
  • Friendly error banner — classified errors with Retry / Open Terminal / Dismiss actions
  • Japanese (日本語) and Simplified Chinese (中文) localisation added; picker now offers EN / KO / JA / ZH
  • Menu-bar pulse and session ring glow follow the lower notification threshold automatically
  • Internal refactor — Theme / BuddyViews / OnboardingView split out as siblings of PopoverContentView (1840 → 1290 lines)

item.title: Version 1.2.0
item.description:
UX upgrade — ETA, sparkline, A2Z typography, and a roomier layout

  • Burn-rate ETA — predicts when the session limit will be hit at current pace
  • 7-day Sparkline trend in the Weekly Limits card (history saved to ~/.claude-usage-widget-history.json)
  • Menu Bar Text format picker — Off / % / Time / Both
  • Warning pulse — menu bar icon breathes at ≥80%, session ring gets a soft glow halo
  • Skeleton loading + spring-animated session ring with numericText transition
  • Refreshed onboarding — animated ring hero and gradient CTA
  • 에이투지체 (A2Z) typography across the popover, wider 400 px layout, larger ring & progress bars
  • Popover background switched from glassmorphism blur to solid off-white / dark surface
  • Settings switches with Claude-orange tint, category icons (SF Symbols)
  • Accessibility labels, ⌘Q quit shortcut, system Reduce Motion honoured
  • Fixed deprecated NSWorkspace.launchApplication and stale footer version label

item.title: Version 1.1.0
item.description:
Major UI overhaul + Sparkle auto-update + Universal Binary

  • Sparkle auto-update (signed via EdDSA)
  • Launch at Login
  • Usage Alerts at 80% / 90% session thresholds
  • Universal Binary (Apple Silicon + Intel)
  • Circular session ring with adaptive color coding
  • Menu bar icon color follows current usage
  • Settings reorganized into Account / General / Notifications / Updates
  • Mini / Full mode toggle, Buddy show/hide, Compact mode
  • Light & Dark mode adaptive theme
  • First-run onboarding (auto-skipped for existing users)
  • Open Terminal button when credentials missing
  • Keyboard shortcuts: ⌘R refresh, ⌘, settings
  • API jitter + 2×→16× exponential backoff for rate-limit safety
  • Bundle ID unified to com.innohi.claudeusagewidget

item.title: Version 1.0.0
item.description:
Initial Sparkle release

  • Auto-update via Sparkle (this release)
  • Launch at Login support
  • Mini/Full mode toggle (hide menu-bar % text)
  • API jitter + exponential backoff for rate-limit safety
  • Notarized Developer ID build
